zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
当前价格围绕1.114附近运行，短线维持在SMA20上方，整体仍属震荡偏强结构，回调幅度有限，多头趋势未被破坏。短线结构偏多整理为主。需关注突破延续性

MACD指标维持正值0.0093附近，动能略有放缓但未死叉，显示多头动能仍在积累，短期缺乏强势突破信号。需等待量能配合确认方向。

下方支撑关注1.110及1.098区域，上方阻力位于1.1196与1.125附近，区间震荡特征明显，突破前仍以区间交易为主。策略偏谨慎

操作建议以低吸高抛为主，激进者可在1.110附近轻仓试多，跌破1.098则需止损观望，等待趋势重新确认再介入。控制风险仓位

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is in a consolidation phase following a 0.47% decline over the past 24 hours. Price remains tightly compressed between 1.1105 and 1.1196, indicating low volatility and balance between buyers and sellers. Despite the pullback, the broader structure remains constructive as price holds above moving average support, suggesting the market is pausing rather than reversing trend.

The 20-day simple moving average at 1.0987 sits below current price, reinforcing a bullish bias and indicating that dips are being supported. MACD remains slightly positive at 0.0093, suggesting subdued upward momentum, though the lack of a signal line limits confirmation strength. With RSI unavailable, momentum assessment relies primarily on price structure and moving average positioning, which favors consolidation above support.

Immediate support is at 1.1100–1.1105, aligned with the recent intraday low and lower boundary of the range. Deeper support is near the 20-day moving average around 1.0987, acting as a key structural floor. On the upside, resistance sits at 1.1196, with a psychological barrier at 1.1200 and extended resistance near 1.1300 if momentum expands beyond the consolidation band.

Range-bound strategy with a slight bullish tilt is favored. Traders may consider accumulating on dips toward 1.1100 with risk below 1.0980 to protect against breakdown toward the moving average. Breakout above 1.1200 could open momentum toward 1.1300, while failure to hold support may signal a return to consolidation. Position sizing should remain moderate due to compressed volatility.
